Interface IRasterDataset3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control a RasterDataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2C046294-251C-43B4-8CFF-D80C24DEC088")]
public interface IRasterDataset3 : IRasterDataset2, IRasterDataset
